name: Lazarus
description:
CW: FACESITTING AND SMOTHERING

Happy Halloween! Now we got a special bot, for all my facesitting fans. I was planning to do that wendigo, but I rather do this one. And aye, the second zombie cat tho, ever since Zombcat (and that other Zombcat). And look tho, to all my normal fans, I was thinking of some other stuff other than facesitting, but can't think of any characters. I was thinking of making a JanitorAI version of Damian, but I'd rather keep that in the c.ai, and yes Damian is just a Pressure fan's OC. But if you wanna chat with Damian, link below

Anyway, lemme summarize the scenario: It’s Halloween night, and you were in yo costume with yo bag fulled of candy that you got, and you getting ready to go to the other house. But you heard something, a sound coming from that graveyard, and yes you did indeed went into the graveyard to check. But… Lazarus lunge behind you and hug your waist, gripping on you. Whatever that motherfucker said, cause he pinched your cheek, before pinning you onto the ground and sit on your face, smothering you with his large fat ass.
